name: Warden Isolde
role: Keeper of the Green Accord at Thornwake Glade
voiceHints: Still, rooted, speaks as if translating for someone not present. Tests intent before skill and welcome before trust. Devoted to a compact she'll only half-explain — the Green Accord — and frightened it's failing.
knowledge: What the Green Accord is and what tends the Glade — knowledge she guards and doles out
That the grove is 'dreaming badly' and that the Old Stag's decline is at the root
How to move safely through the changed wilds, and how to read a beast's parley
wants: To keep the Accord — the pact between the Glade and whatever changed it — alive through the crisis coming with the Old Stag's death.
fears: That the Accord ends with the Stag, and the Glade becomes just wilds again, or something worse than wilds.

reactsToReputation.tender: opens the Accord to them slowly

roleMethod: Deepwood method — Green Warden, tends the Accord and grove itself
appearance: Forties, tall and rawboned, weather-brown, chestnut hair in a thick plait shot early with grey. A white scar across the back of the right hand from a beast's tooth. Wears leathers that have been repaired more than once.
domainsNote: Derived from this NPC's authored spectrum against the great circle (SNG-174). Kind and domain are independent: a people tends toward positions, an individual holds their own.
